auth.verifyEmailBody: Tap the link in the email to finish signing up. You can log in after confirming.
auth.resetPasswordBody: We'll send a reset link to your email.
auth.resetLinkInvalid: The link is invalid or expired. Please send a new reset email.
auth.deleteAccountConfirm: Deleting your account is permanent. Shared budget data stays with your partner but your info is anonymized. Delete anyway?

aiConsent.title: About receipt scanning
aiConsent.body: Receipt auto-scan (OCR) runs entirely on your device. Captured images are never sent anywhere — the text is read locally on your phone. Enable this feature?

tracking.title: Tracking for ads
tracking.body: We ask permission to track in order to show more relevant ads. The app works even if you decline.

pairing.title: Share with partner
pairing.body: Share your invite code or enter your partner's code to pair up. You can do this later too.
pairing.alreadyPaired: You're already paired. Unpair first to join a different pair.
pairing.confirmSend: Once approved, you'll join your partner's budget book (your past records won't move over). Send the request?
pairing.requestSent: Request sent. Waiting for your partner's approval.
pairing.requestDeclined: Your pair request was not approved
pairing.approveConfirm: Pair with {{name}}? They'll join your budget book.

home.title: Home
home.emptyBody: Snap a receipt or enter manually — it's quick.
home.invitePartnerCta: Invite your partner to manage together

expense.deleteConfirmSettled: This expense is already settled. Deleting it will not change past settlement amounts. Delete anyway?
expense.settledNotice: This expense is already settled. Editing or deleting it will not change past settlement amounts.
expense.ocrFailed: Something went wrong while reading. Retake the photo or enter manually.
expense.ocrNoText: No text detected. Try shooting straight on in good light, with the whole receipt in view.
expense.ocrNoAmount: Couldn't find the total. Retake with the total line in focus, or enter it manually.
expense.ocrReview: Review and fix the scanned values
expense.emptyBody: Start recording from the button below.

settlement.title: Settle up
settlement.unconvertedWarning: Some currencies lack an exchange rate and are excluded: {{currencies}}
settlement.enterRatesBody: Enter JPY per unit to include foreign-currency expenses in settlement.

sharedAccount.title: Shared account
sharedAccount.emptyBody: Track deposits to see the shared balance.
sharedAccount.note: Purchases paid from the shared account (select "Shared account" on the expense form) appear here. Use Withdraw / adjust to correct the balance.

fixedCosts.title: Fixed costs
fixedCosts.name: Name
fixedCosts.typeFixedDesc: Same amount every month (e.g. rent). Posted automatically on the billing day
fixedCosts.typeVariableDesc: Amount changes every month (e.g. electricity). You enter it yourself each month
fixedCosts.monthEndNote: In months without that date (29–31), it posts on the last day
fixedCosts.reminderDayNote: You'll be notified on this day if the month's amount isn't entered yet
fixedCosts.deleteConfirm: Delete this fixed cost? Existing expense records will remain.
fixedCosts.emptyBody: Add rent or utilities to automate monthly entries.

budget.title: Budget
budget.emptyBody: Set monthly budgets per category to avoid overspending.

report.title: Reports
report.emptyBody: Charts appear once you record expenses.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyBody: Partner activity and reminders show up here.

categories.title: Categories
categories.name: Category name
categories.hideConfirmBody: It won't appear as a choice when adding expenses. Past records stay, and you can show it again anytime from “Hidden categories” below.
categories.cannotDeleteDefault: Default categories can't be deleted (you can hide them)

profile.title: Profile
profile.unpairConfirm: Unpair? You can still view expenses you recorded after unpairing.
profile.unpairUnsettledBody: You have an unsettled balance ({{amount}}). If you unpair now, it can no longer be settled. We recommend settling first.

error.network: A network error occurred. Please check your connection.
error.auth: Authentication failed. Check your email and password.
error.emailNotConfirmed: Your email isn't confirmed yet. Please open the link in the confirmation email.
error.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again later.
error.samePassword: New password must be different from your current one.
error.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please start over.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters
error.conflict: This expense was updated on another device. Please reopen it to see the latest version.
error.cameraPermission: Camera access is not allowed. Please enable it in the Settings app.
error.photoPermission: Photo access is not allowed. Please enable it in the Settings app.
error.crashBody: The app hit an unexpected error. Please try again.
error.mockMode: Demo mode. Real data works after Supabase setup.
